purpose: Master index of model variants keyed by dataset, data contract, model configuration, and training mode. This is a discoverability layer over completed backlog outputs; summary authority documents remain the detailed source of truth.

model_variants.paper_label: Hybrid ResNet + PINN + fixed residual scale
Hybrid ResNet + PINN + skip-add + fixed residual scale

model_variants.changed_factor: encoder_fusion_mode=layerscale; per-block outer LayerScale on the fused update

model_variants.paper_label: Hybrid ResNet + PINN + encoder branch gates
model_variants.changed_factor: encoder_fusion_mode=branch_gated; per-block spectral and local branch gates

model_variants.paper_label: Hybrid ResNet + PINN + encoder branch gates + LayerScale

model_variants.changed_factor: encoder_branch_select=conv_only; deterministically removes the spectral encoder branch while preserving the local 3x3 conv path, identity residual, bottleneck, decoder, loss, and contract.
encoder_branch_select=spectral_only; deterministically removes the local 3x3 conv encoder branch while preserving the spectral (FNO) path, identity residual, bottleneck, decoder, loss, and contract.
training_mode=supervised; identical SRU-Net body and contract knobs as pinn_hybrid_resnet, only the training objective changed. Objective-control row, not a CDI headline candidate.

model_variants.blocker_message: Classical Born backprop reference requires ODTbrain for the decision-support claim boundary; only the local-adjoint fallback is available.

maintenance_rules: Every future completed backlog item that emits model metrics must add or update at least one model_variants entry.
If a completed item is purely a harness, decision, or audit output, represent it in ablation_index.json and evidence_matrix.md even when no new model_variants row exists.
Do not use the evidence_status field as the claim source of truth. Use the source_summary and paper evidence audit for claim wording.
